name: Architecture issue
about: Record architecture boundaries, ADRs, or core design decisions.
title: ""

## Background

Describe the architecture problem, decision boundary, or repository constraint.

## Goal

State the outcome this issue should make true.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The relevant boundary or decision is documented.
- [ ] The documentation names affected subsystems or contracts.
- [ ] Non-goals and deferred work are explicit.
- [ ] Validation or review evidence is recorded.

## Non-goals

- None yet.

## Context Safety

- [ ] No full logs, reports, diffs, or large artifacts are pasted inline.
- [ ] Large evidence is represented by artifact paths or compact locators.
